name: Low-Calorie Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease or spray a 9-inch pie pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Combine all ingredients in a blender, food processor, or mixing bowl.
4. Blend for 1 minute or beat until well combined for 2 minutes using a mixer.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie pan and bake for 50 minutes or until the center is puffed up.
Nutritional Information:
1/8 pie - 114 calories, 1 1/2 starch/bread exchange (18.5 grams carbohydrate, 6.3 grams protein, 1.9 grams fat, 1.4 gm fiber), 174.9 mg sodium, 304.2 mg potassium, 37 mg cholesterol
Source: American Diabetes Association Family Cookbook, Vol II, 1987. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93.
